body:
### Security intent

This control hardens workloads by ensuring that **namespace enabled restricted pod security admission or if there are external policies (validating/mutating webhooks)**.

### Workload state reviewed

The assessment reviews checks that every namespace enabled restricted pod security admission in Kubernetes. It focuses on the workload, runtime, image, role, network, or platform setting relevant to this control.

### Remediation focus

Treat compute findings as workload changes. Confirm ownership, update infrastructure as code or deployment templates, roll out in batches where needed, and validate that new resources inherit the corrected baseline.
name: Ensure namespace enabled restricted pod security admission or if there are external policies (validating/mutating webhooks)
remediationDescription:
Ensure that either Pod Security Admission or an external policy control system is in place for every namespace which contains user workloads.

#### Impact Statement

Where policy control systems are in place, there is a risk that workloads required for the operation of the cluster may be stopped from running. Care is required when implementing admission control policies to ensure that this does not occur.

#### Default Value

By default, Pod Security Admission is enabled but no policies are in place.
description: Checks that every namespace enabled restricted pod security admission
